overall.description: Bus simulator gameplay showing first-person driving perspective through rainy urban streets. The vehicle navigates multi-lane roads with moderate traffic, stopping at traffic lights and passing concrete apartment buildings and commercial structures. Heavy rain and active windshield wipers create a wet, atmospheric driving environment typical of European city settings.

events.description: passing illuminated storefronts with warm interior lighting on the right side
approaching traffic signal intersection with tram tracks visible

agents.ego_description: operating bus through wet city streets, maintaining steady speed past commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: white car traveling in parallel lane alongside the bus

digital display showing route map and turn instructions
multi-story building with large glass windows showing warm interior lighting

rain-slicked multi-lane road surface with water reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment opens from the driver's perspective inside a bus cockpit, showing the dashboard and GPS screen. The vehicle travels along a wet multi-lane city street during heavy rain, passing illuminated commercial buildings on the right and concrete apartment blocks on the left. Windshield wipers maintain visibility as the bus approaches an intersection with visible tram tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching signalized intersection with tram tracks

events.description: slowing down as traffic light ahead shows red signal
coming to complete stop behind queue of vehicles at intersection

agents.ego_description: braking gradually to stop at red traffic light, joining the vehicle queue

notable_agents.action: dark sedan stopped at traffic light directly ahead of bus

entered.detail: tall pole with horizontal traffic signals showing red light
metal rail tracks embedded in the center of the road surface

segments.scene_description: The bus slows as it approaches a signalized intersection, with tram tracks becoming visible in the road ahead. The traffic light displays red, requiring the vehicle to stop behind a queue of cars. The concrete apartment building on the left moves closer to the foreground as the bus decelerates, while the commercial buildings pass out of view.

scene_state.functional_zone: stopped at traffic light in vehicle queue

events.description: waiting at red light with delivery truck queued ahead
traffic signal changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: stationary at intersection, waiting for traffic signal to change to green

notable_agents.action: delivery truck with red and white cab stopped directly ahead in queue

entered.detail: low-rise building with visible TATTOO signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: The bus remains stationary at the red light, positioned behind a delivery truck in the vehicle queue. A building with tattoo parlor signage becomes visible on the right side. The traffic light pole moves closer into view as the bus waits, and the signal eventually changes to green, allowing traffic to proceed.

scene_state.functional_zone: proceeding through intersection along tram line

events.description: accelerating from stop through the intersection as light turns green
passing through intersection with cross traffic visible on the left

agents.ego_description: accelerating from the stop line, proceeding through the intersection and continuing down the avenue

notable_agents.action: silver car overtaking the bus on the left side through the intersection

entered.detail: contemporary office building with reflective glass facade
vertical pole with circular traffic sign indicating restrictions

segments.scene_description: The bus accelerates through the green light, crossing the intersection with tram tracks shifting to the left side of the vehicle. A modern glass office building comes into view on the right, replacing the earlier commercial structures. The bus passes other vehicles while continuing down the wet avenue, with the concrete apartment building receding into the mid-ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: continuing along avenue with parked cars and tree line

events.description: navigating past continuous row of parked vehicles on right curb

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed along wet avenue, navigating past parked cars and following the road

notable_agents.action: blue car parked along the street curb

entered.detail: continuous row of trees lining the sidewalk along the left side
continuous line of cars parked along the right curb

segments.scene_description: The bus continues along the multi-lane avenue, now passing a row of parked cars on the right and a tree line on the left. The modern glass building passes out of view, while the concrete apartment block recedes into the distance. The tram tracks remain visible on the left side of the road as the vehicle maintains steady progress through the rainy urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cockpit as it navigates a rain-slicked urban corridor toward a complete stop at a city intersection. It begins with the vehicle cruising along a wet multi-lane street, where the dashboard and GPS are visible while illuminated commercial buildings and concrete apartment blocks slide past in the heavy rain. As the bus maintains its forward momentum, the windshield wipers clear the glass to reveal tram tracks embedded in the road ahead. The scene then shifts as the vehicle decelerates, causing the commercial structures to recede from view while the concrete apartment buildings on the left loom closer in the foreground. Finally, the camera comes to a halt behind a queue of cars as the traffic light turns red at the signalized intersection.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a stationary position at a city intersection to a steady drive down a rainy urban avenue. It begins with the bus idling behind a delivery truck at a red light, where a tattoo parlor sign is visible on the right before the signal turns green. As the vehicle accelerates through the intersection, the view shifts from the initial commercial structures to a modern glass office building on the right while tram tracks glide past on the left. The scene then expands as the bus maintains its speed, passing a row of parked cars and a line of trees as the glass building and distant concrete apartments recede. Finally, the camera continues forward along the multi-lane road, keeping the tram tracks in sight amidst the persistent rain.
